name: python3-ujson
title: python3-ujson
summary: ultra fast JSON encoder and decoder for Python 3
description:
ultra fast JSON encoder and decoder for Python 3
UltraJSON is an ultra fast JSON encoder and decoder written in pure C with
bindings for Python.
.
This package contains the Python 3 module of ujson.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ujson because ultra fast JSON encoder and decoder for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ujson as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ujson with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ujson --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
